stemHtml:
Pilots are frequently trained in simulators to deal with stressors in the cockpit. At some point during their training, they are faced with random stressors.

What is the purpose of this training?

options.a: It is a form of long-term based stress training, it is to help them to deal with all types of situations and stressors in the cockpit.
options.b: Long-term programme to deal with stress.
options.c: Short-term programme to deal with stress.
options.d: It is a form of symptom-based training, it will help them learn how their own bodies react to stress and to help them cope with unexpected situations.
